name: fill_template
description: Read a .md template from domain_data/templates/, substitute {{placeholder}} tokens with a data dict, and return the filled content. Call md_save afterwards to persist the result. Discover available templates via search_files(folder='templates').

template_path.description: Absolute path to a .md template file inside domain_data/templates/. E.g. /path/to/data/domain_data/templates/cpty_intel_brief.md

data.description: Flat key-value dict of placeholder substitutions. Keys must match the {{placeholder}} tokens in the template exactly. Values must be strings or numbers.

output_filename.description: Output filename for the filled file including .md extension. Defaults to {template_stem}_filled_{timestamp}.md.

output_subfolder.description: Sub-folder within my_data/ where the filled file is saved. Default: reports.

content.description: The fully substituted markdown string. Pass to md_save to persist.

placeholders_missing.description: List of {{tokens}} found in template but not supplied in data dict.
